data.title: Bitmine just staked $214 million worth of ETH.
data.description: According to Arkham, Bitmine has just staked $214 million worth of ETH; Bitmine currently holds a total of $8.45 billion worth of staked ETH, representing 9.5% of all staked ETH on the network.

data.title: Polymarket is undergoing a coordinated upgrade of its exchange stack, which is expected to end at 20:00.
data.description: According to official sources, Polymarket is undergoing a coordinated upgrade of its exchange stack, including new smart contracts, a rewritten order book, and new collateral tokens. Trading will be suspended for approximately one hour during the switchover (until approximately 20:00 UTC+8).

data.title: Italy Urged to Monitor Spending Amid Economic Challenges
data.description: Italy must carefully manage its spending to adhere to European Union fiscal rules, according to Andrea Brandolini, an official from the Bank of Italy. Bloomberg posted on X that Brandolini emphasized the importance of fiscal discipline in light of the country's deteriorating economic growth outlook. The warning comes as Italy faces increasing pressure to balance its budget while navigating economic uncertainties. Brandolini's remarks highlight the challenges Italy faces in maintaining fiscal stability within the EU framework. The Bank of Italy continues to monitor the situation closely, urging the government to prioritize prudent financial management.

data.title: Global Markets Remain Unfazed by Iran Conflict
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X that Asia equities reporter Winnie Yu and markets reporter Ruth Carson discussed on the Big Take podcast why global markets are currently overlooking the ongoing conflict in Iran. They explained to host Sarah Holder that while the situation in Iran has not significantly impacted market trends, this could change depending on future developments. Investors are advised to stay informed as geopolitical tensions may eventually influence market dynamics.

data.title: Proposed Bitcoin Hard Fork in August 2026 to Introduce eCash
data.description: Paul Sztorc has announced a proposed Bitcoin hard fork set for August 2026 at block 964,000, which would provide holders with 1 eCash for each 1 BTC. According to NS3.AI, while BTC balances will remain on the Bitcoin mainnet, the final launch software, replay rules, and coin-splitting tools are still pending verification. The proposal currently lacks support from major miners, exchanges, custodians, and wallets, raising concerns about liquidity and usability.

data.title: Spain's Economy Minister Projects 2026 Budget Deficit at 1.6% of GDP
data.description: Spain's Economy Minister has projected that the country's budget deficit for this year will be 1.6% of its GDP, excluding one-time expenditures. According to Jin10, this forecast reflects the government's ongoing efforts to manage fiscal policy amid economic challenges. The minister emphasized the importance of maintaining fiscal discipline while addressing various economic priorities.

data.title: Data: Over $6 billion in stablecoin inflows into Binance over the past two months.
data.description: According to Cryptoquant data, Binance saw a total inflow of over $6 billion in stablecoins in the past two months.

data.title: Block Inc Increases Bitcoin Holdings with Additional Purchase
data.description: Block Inc, led by Jack Dorsey, has acquired an additional 114.89 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 8,998 bitcoins. According to Odaily, this acquisition places Block Inc at the 14th position on the Bitcoin 100 list.

data.title: Block Inc increased its holdings by 114.89 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 8,998 bitcoins.
data.description: Jack Dorsey's Block Inc ($XYZ) purchased an additional 114.89 Bitcoins, bringing his total holdings to 8,998. This places him at number 14 on the Bitcoin 100 list. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Launch: Changelly and Tonkeeper Enable Cross-Chain Deposits into TON
data.description: Changelly and Tonkeeper have introduced a new feature allowing in-wallet cross-chain deposits into the TON network from 13 different networks. According to NS3.AI, this integration enables users to fund their Tonkeeper wallets with USDT, USDC, or DAI directly within the app, enhancing user convenience and streamlining the process.

data.title: ECB Policy Focuses on Growth Risks Over Inflation Concerns
data.description: Asset management firm Algebris Investments' global credit portfolio manager, Gabriele Foa, stated in a report that European Central Bank (ECB) policymakers are likely to prioritize growth risks over inflation concerns in their policy decisions on Thursday. According to Jin10, Foa highlighted that data across Europe continues to show weakness, contrasting with the more resilient growth momentum in the United States and the United Kingdom. Despite the growth risks, the market has priced in more than two rate hikes by the ECB by the end of 2026, with expectations set at 66 basis points, based on data from the London Stock Exchange Group. Foa noted, "Growth expectations are being revised downward, although the extent of the revision is not significant relative to the potential downside risks." He also mentioned that the market is unlikely to tolerate further fiscal slippage without demanding higher compensation at the long end of the yield curve.

data.title: Microsoft Price Target Reduced Amid AI Spending Concerns
data.description: Oppenheimer Holdings has lowered its price target for Microsoft from $630 to $515 while maintaining an Outperform rating with a buy recommendation. According to NS3.AI, the decision reflects concerns over AI-related expenditures and Microsoft's substantial $120 billion capital expenditure.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with MARA down 1.97%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with COIN down 1.72%, MSTR down 1.73%, ABTC down 1.65%, HOOD down 1.54%, and MARA down 1.97%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: After two years of silence, a whale has once again purchased 300 BTC, worth $23.03 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, whale bc1q8w has bought 300 BTC again after two years, worth $23.03 million. Two years ago, the whale withdrew 322.57 BTC from Binance at a price of $28,179, worth $9.09 million.

data.title: Closed-End Funds Target Retail Investors with Tech Giants Like SpaceX
data.description: Closed-end funds are increasingly focusing on retail investors by promoting investments in high-profile tech companies such as SpaceX. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the trend as these funds aim to capitalize on the anticipated initial public offerings (IPOs) of these tech giants. The strategy involves attracting investors with the promise of potential gains from these high-demand stocks before they go public. This move comes as the market for tech IPOs shows signs of heating up, with investors eager to participate in the growth of leading technology firms. The funds are positioning themselves to offer access to these companies, which are often out of reach for individual investors until they go public. As the IPO landscape evolves, closed-end funds are leveraging their ability to invest in private companies to appeal to retail investors seeking exposure to the tech sector's growth potential.

data.title: SM Prime to Cut Capital Spending Amid Iran Conflict Volatility
data.description: SM Prime Holdings, the largest mall operator in the Philippines, plans to reduce its capital spending this year due to uncertainties arising from the ongoing conflict involving Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that the company is taking precautionary measures to navigate the volatile economic environment. The decision reflects concerns over potential disruptions in the global market, which could impact consumer spending and business operations. SM Prime aims to maintain financial stability while adapting to the changing geopolitical landscape. The company remains focused on its core operations and strategic initiatives to ensure long-term growth despite the challenges posed by the current situation.

data.title: Italy's Debt-to-GDP Ratio Could Exceed 139% by 2027, Budget Watchdog Warns
data.description: Italy's budget oversight authority has issued a warning regarding the country's debt levels. According to Jin10, if the Italian government fails to execute its asset sale plans, the debt-to-GDP ratio is projected to surpass 139% by 2027, rather than decreasing to 138.6%.

data.title: Messari provides an in-depth analysis of Bitget's four-layer AI architecture, pioneering a comprehensive AI access system.
data.description: Messari's latest Pulse report provides an in-depth breakdown of the early implementation progress of Bitget's AI trading system. The report points out that Bitget has built a four-layer AI product architecture encompassing GetAgent (market analysis), GetClaw (autonomous execution), Agent Hub (developer access), and Gracy AI (strategy interaction). Data shows that Gracy AI attracted over 460,000 users in just 11 days, generating over 2.6 million replies and achieving 390 million impressions. GetAgent has surpassed 450,000 registered users, achieving over 100 million impressions during its early invitation-only testing phase and accumulating over 25,000 potential users. Messari highlights Agent Hub's infrastructure capabilities in the report, noting that Bitget is currently the only trading platform simultaneously supporting a complete MCP Server, REST/WebSocket API, Skills, and CLI calling system. Agent Hub currently integrates 5 analytical AI Skills and 15+ data tools, comprehensively covering macro, technical, sentiment, and intelligence analysis. GetClaw, at the execution layer, builds a risk control defense through sub-account segregation, sandbox exercises, and capital limits. It is currently integrated with Telegram and will be expanded to Discord and the App in the future. Bitget CEO Gracy Chen stated that AI is becoming a core component of modern trading infrastructure, and early data shows that users increasingly expect complete integration of analytics, execution, and strategy within a single platform. Bitget is committed to lowering the barriers to professional trading through AI technology, providing institutional-grade trading experiences and decision support to 150 million users worldwide.

data.title: China National Gold Group Reports Strong Q1 2026 Financial Results
data.description: China National Gold Group announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. According to Jin10, the company reported a revenue of 22.588 billion yuan, marking a 52.01% increase compared to the same period last year. The net profit for the quarter was 2.381 billion yuan, reflecting a significant growth of 129.23% year-on-year. The net profit attributable to shareholders of the listed company also stood at 2.381 billion yuan, up by 129.23% from the previous year. The basic earnings per share were reported at 0.49 yuan, representing a 133.33% increase year-on-year.

data.title: Crypto Attacks Shift Focus from Smart Contracts to Private Key Breaches
data.description: In the past decade (2016–2026), the cryptocurrency sector has experienced cumulative losses of $17.1 billion, involving 518 incidents. According to Odaily, over the past five years (2021–2026), losses amounted to approximately $15.2 billion across more than 450 incidents. In the last year alone (April 2025–April 2026), the sector saw losses of around $2.5 billion from over 140 incidents. Recent data indicates a shift in crypto attacks from exploiting smart contract vulnerabilities to targeting private key leaks and access control issues.
